overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic subway train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The camera pans around the neon-lit interior showing various NPC passengers seated and standing while advertisements and city lights flash past the windows.

events.description: train passes by illuminated buildings visible through the window
camera begins slow pan to the left

agents.ego_description: standing in the subway train observing fellow passengers and the passing city lights

notable_agents.action: man in tactical gear eating from a container and drinking
masked passenger seated and looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: yellow-brown bench seat with metal frame
futuristic UI panel showing route information and time 02:11
large rectangular window showing passing city lights
red illuminated advertisement poster on the wall
vertical metal pole for standing passengers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic subway car with neon lighting. A man in tactical gear sits on the center bench eating and drinking while the train moves through Night City. The digital display shows the route information overhead as city lights blur past the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train standing area with support poles

events.description: camera pans left revealing yellow support poles and standing passengers
large illuminated security advertisement becomes visible on the wall

agents.ego_description: panning around the train interior to observe different passengers and architectural details

notable_agents.action: passenger in white jacket and blue pants seated near the window
standing passenger holding onto the yellow support pole

entered.detail: bright yellow vertical pole for passengers to grip
large glowing billboard reading SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST
horizontal handrail mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal the standing area of the subway car with distinctive yellow support poles. A large security advertisement illuminates the wall as the train continues moving. Passengers are seen both seated and standing, holding onto poles and overhead rails.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train center aisle with advertisements

events.description: health warning poster with X symbol comes into view on the left wall
camera moves forward through the train aisle passing close to passengers

agents.ego_description: moving through the train car passing close to other passengers and examining the interior

notable_agents.action: woman with ponytail and leather jacket looking down at something in her hands
man in cap and dark clothing standing in the aisle

entered.detail: white poster with black text reading HEALTH WARNING with X symbol

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right and moves through the train aisle, revealing a health warning poster on the wall. The view shows the depth of the train car with multiple passengers seated and standing. A woman with a ponytail appears in the foreground as the camera explores the confined neon-lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan through the neon-lit interior of a futuristic subway car, moving from a focused view of a passenger to a broader exploration of the crowded cabin. It begins centered on a man in tactical gear eating and drinking on a bench while city lights blur past the windows and a digital route display glows overhead. As the camera pans left, the view shifts toward the standing area where passengers grip yellow support poles beneath a brightly illuminated security advertisement. The movement then sweeps back to the right and glides through the aisle, passing a health warning poster on the wall. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal the full depth of the confined space, passing a woman with a ponytail as the camera surveys the remaining seated and standing passengers.
